message:
fix: clean up stale SQLite references and tech debt in beads package (gt-76oep)

- Update comments referencing "SQLite column directly" to be backend-agnostic
- Annotate legacy SQLite cleanup patterns in beads_redirect.go
- Fix beads_test.go comment referencing "SQLite database"
- Optimize ListDelegationsFrom to avoid redundant Show calls per issue
- Move HasLabel from deprecated beads_role.go to beads.go
- Add file.Sync() to WriteRoutes before close for data durability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
